summary: Footage of a press conference. A man in a dark suit and tie speaks at a podium, with another man in a suit standing behind him to the left. The backdrop carries the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services and U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement with their seals, and a banner reading OPERATION TWIN SHIELD. U.S. flags stand to the left.

script.scene: A man speaks at a podium in front of a backdrop reading OPERATION TWIN SHIELD with USCIS and ICE seals; another man stands behind him.
The speaker continues; U.S. flags are visible to the left.
The speaker continues addressing the press conference.

notable_text: OPERATION TWIN SHIELD; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement
